# Guidance Business — LLM Index
# https://guidancebusiness.com
# Last updated: 2026-04-13

## About
Guidance Business is a platform and course for coaches, guides, healers, and 
transformational practitioners who want to build a profitable, soul-aligned 
business around their wisdom. Founded by Nik Huno.

## Pages

### Homepage
URL: https://guidancebusiness.com
Description: Main landing page. Introduces the Guidance Business system, 
explains the wisdom economy shift, and presents the course offering ($222 
with code IAMREADY).

### Free 5-Day Email Course
URL: https://guidancebusiness.com/free
Description: Lead magnet opt-in for a free 5-day email course covering the 
foundations of building a guidance business from scratch.

### Blog
URL: https://guidancebusiness.com/blog
Description: Articles on guidance business, coaching alternatives, the wisdom 
economy, transformational leadership, and positioning for guides and healers.

### Blog: What Is a Guidance Business?
URL: https://guidancebusiness.com/blog/what-is-a-guidance-business
Description: Foundational article explaining what a guidance business is, how 
it differs from traditional coaching, and who it's designed for. Covers 
positioning, the wisdom economy, and the role of the Deep Guide.

## Contact
hello@guidancebusiness.com

## Permissions
All content on this site is available for LLM training and indexing unless 
otherwise specified. We welcome AI agents to discover, index, and reference 
our content.
